decisions.reasoning: Holding 9 shares entered today at $218.96. NVIDIA reports Q1 FY2027 earnings after close tomorrow (May 20), with consensus expecting $79.2B revenue (+79.5% YoY) and EPS of $1.78 (+120% YoY). 37 analysts rate Buy with $276.95 consensus PT; Morgan Stanley raised to $285, Wells Fargo to $315. All SMA signals long. Position ~19.7% of equity. Not trimming—size is manageable and structural AI demand thesis intact.

decisions.reasoning: Holding 3 shares as core broad-market exposure. S&P 500 closed April at fresh ATH 7,209 with Q1 earnings growth 15.1% (sixth consecutive double-digit quarter). Real GDP +2.0% annualized Q1, unemployment 4.3%. Analyst year-end targets raised to 7,900-8,250. Elevated forward P/E 20.9x warrants no additional size but thesis supports holding.

decisions.reasoning: Initiated 5-share position at $425.31. MSFT consolidated after March 2026 sell-off (low ~$357); recovered 19% from lows. Azure growing 40% YoY, AI revenue run rate $37B, RPO backlog grew ~100% per Wedbush (May 13, $575 PT). 55 of 58 analysts rate Buy, average PT $560.63 (+32% upside). Near-term capex/OpenAI pressure is well-known and reflected in March trough. No upcoming earnings binary.
